prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile app daily check-in share poster background
Primary request: Cute 3D cartoon green slime monsters celebrating a daily study check-in at a cozy desk. A glowing golden checkmark badge floats above them. Colorful confetti, a desk calendar with green checkmarks, warm desk lamp glow.
Style/medium: polished 3D mobile game illustration, Pixar-like cute characters
Composition/framing: EXACT portrait 5:8 canvas (width:height = 5:8). Place ALL main characters, checkmark, calendar, and lamp in the UPPER 55%. Keep the BOTTOM 35% completely clean — only a simple dark purple floor or soft gradient, NO characters or objects. Reserved for text overlay.
Scene/backdrop: dark cozy study room at night, deep purple and indigo tones, subtle stars through window
Lighting/mood: warm celebratory glow, festive
Color palette: deep purple background, lime green monsters, golden yellow accents
Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no UI elements
Avoid: landscape orientation, square format, characters in bottom third

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile app daily check-in share poster background
Primary request: Two cute translucent jelly slime characters facing off in an epic battle — one neon green, one vivid purple — with a bright golden lightning bolt striking between their fists. Energy trails, battle-ready poses.
Style/medium: polished 3D mobile game battle scene
Composition/framing: EXACT portrait 5:8 canvas (width:height = 5:8). Place both characters and the lightning strike in the UPPER 50% only. Keep BOTTOM 40% clean dark arena floor with subtle grid reflections only — NO characters, NO lightning. Reserved for text overlay.
Scene/backdrop: dark futuristic stadium arena, neon green and purple spotlights in upper corners
Lighting/mood: dramatic high-contrast battle lighting
Color palette: black/dark blue arena, neon green, vivid purple, golden yellow energy
Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark
Avoid: landscape orientation, square format, characters in bottom third
